title: Emergency Braking System in Four-Wheeler
description: Arduino-based emergency braking system for a four-wheeler with ABS logic, accelerometer-based crash detection, and hydraulic pressure modulation via solenoid valves.
objective: Achieve emergency stop from 60 km/h in < 20 m; prevent wheel lock-up via ABS; trigger automatic braking on crash detection.
constraints: 12 V vehicle electrical system; retain manual brake pedal; BOM < ₹5000; Arduino Mega controller.
supporting_fact_titles: Hydraulic Disc Brake — Four-Wheeler Emergency Stop
Anti-lock Braking System (ABS) — Wheel Slip Control
design_element_titles: Hydraulic Disc Brake — Four-Wheel Emergency Stop

element_usage_notes.Hydraulic Disc Brake — Four-Wheel Emerge: Primary braking; ABS solenoid cycles at 12 Hz on wheel-lock detection.
element_usage_notes.Eddy-Current Electromagnetic Brake: Secondary contactless braking at speeds > 5 km/h to supplement hydraulics.
